name: cjm-notebook-decompose-core
summary: A Jupyter/nbdev notebook decomposition core for context graphs: a notebook IS a CodeModule whose authored source is an ordered sequence of VERBATIM cells (the lossless source substrate), composing the python decomposer (code cells -> symbols) and the markdown decomposer (markdown cells -> prose) with interleaving edges. The first step toward graph-as-source-of-truth (notebook -> graph).
